name: synth-lang
description: Synth — AI-native programming language that transpiles to JavaScript

scripts.test:examples: node tools/synth_bootstrap_cli.js --test examples/rpg.syn && node tools/synth_bootstrap_cli.js --test examples/v04_features.syn && node tools/synth_bootstrap_cli.js --test examples/v095_features.syn && node tools/synth_bootstrap_cli.js --test examples/v1_features.syn && node tools/synth_bootstrap_cli.js --test examples/dungeon/config.syn && node tools/synth_bootstrap_cli.js --test examples/bazaar/items.syn
scripts.build:toolchain: npm run build:bootstrap && npm run build:browser-bootstrap
scripts.test:toolchain: npm run test:double-bootstrap && npm run test:fixed-point && npm run test:playground-bootstrap && node tools/synth_bootstrap_cli.js --test compiler/ast_test.syn
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:compiler && npm run test:bootstrap-goldens && npm run test:toolchain
scripts.build-demo: node tools/synth_bootstrap_cli.js examples/controls.syn demo/controls.synth.js && node tools/embed_sources.js
scripts.build-music: node tools/synth_bootstrap_cli.js examples/music.syn demo/music.synth.js && node tools/embed_music.js
scripts.build-combat: node tools/synth_bootstrap_cli.js examples/combat.syn demo/combat.synth.js && node tools/embed_combat.js
scripts.build-rpg: node tools/synth_bootstrap_cli.js examples/rpg.syn demo/rpg.synth.js && node tools/embed_rpg.js
scripts.build-rpg-standalone: node tools/synth_bootstrap_cli.js examples/rpg.syn demo/rpg.synth.js && node tools/embed_rpg.js && node tools/build_standalone_rpg.js
